steps: Centrifuge a maximum of 5 million cells for 5 minutes at 300g 00:05:00
Resuspend pellet in 200μL of PBS undetermined 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )
Add 20μL proteinase K. undetermined Proteinase K, 2mL Qiagen Catalog #19131
Add 200μL Buffer AL and mix thoroughly by vortexing undetermined Buffer AL, Lysis buffer Qiagen Catalog #19076
Add 200μL pure ethanol and mix by vortexing undetermined Ethanol, pure Omnipure Filter Company Catalog #4455
Pipet mixture into DNeasy Mini spin column placed on a 2mL collection tube (supplied with kit)
Centrifuge column at ≥6,000g for 1 minute 00:01:00
Discard collection tube and flow through
Place spin column in new 2mL collection tube
Add 500μL buffer AW1 undetermined Buffer AW1, Wash buffer (1), concentrate Qiagen Catalog #19081
Centrifuge for 1 minute at≥6,000g 00:01:00
Discard collection tube and flow through
Add 500μL of Buffer AW2 undetermined Buffer AW2, Wash buffer (2), concentrate Qiagen Catalog #19072
Centrifuge at 20,000g for 3 minutes 00:30:00
Discard collection tube and flow through
Transfer spin column to new (final and labeled) collection tube [optionally sterilized]
Elute DNA by adding 200μL of buffer AE to the center of the spin column undetermined Buffer AE, Elution buffer, 240mL Qiagen Catalog #19077
Incubate for 1 minute at room temperature 00:01:00
Centrifuge at ≥6,000g for 1 minute 00:01:00
[Optiona]: Repeat step 19 for increased DNA yield
creator: Harold Bien
